title: Parkour Blocks
description: Adds blocks that increase jump height, movement speed.
body:
### **Adds blocks that increase jump height, walking speed**


#### Note: these blocks do not give potion effects, they have such dependencies on their own 
---
* This mod is in alpha, it has some bugs like blocks that only face one way, or speed increase after a while, but I will continue to improve this mod to make it the best 
---
### [Showcase of the mod](https://youtu.be/XEU0-uqr_HQ?si=0hb3ZwXSmdkNunLt)
---
 **Feel free to add this mod to modpacks**
